module-checks.check-1: Static edge config forces HTTP to HTTPS for krotpn.xyz.
module-checks.check-2: Wildcard TLS paths and canonical domain settings are present.
module-checks.check-3: Production-like smoke proves HTTPS frontend/backend/admin and one MTProto SNI path.

scenarios.scenario-2: Normal HTTPS traffic reaches KrotPN frontend/API/admin through fallback route.
scenarios.scenario-3: Telegram fake-TLS traffic for issued SNI reaches MTProto runtime.
scenarios.scenario-4: Shared 443 rollback restores previous nginx-only public behavior.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Certificate private keys and .env content must never be printed during edge verification.
